siteConfig.title: BACKLASH MEDIA EVENTS
siteConfig.tagline: Bent Stories · Proud Perspectives · Out Loud
siteConfig.footerCopy: BENT STORIES · PROUD PERSPECTIVES · OUT LOUD

events.title: BRAVE SPACE: TRANS DAY OF VISIBILITY EDITION
events.desc: A special XL edition of Brave Space making room for trans voices that are too often sidelined. Featuring Joseph Kearney, Diana Salles, Indie Nile, Dora Royale, Emma Voerman, Liora ten Brinke & Kaya. Pay what you can.

events.title: HERE LIES LOLA — SHORT FILM
events.desc: We’re making a short film and we need your support! ‘Here Lies Lola’ shoots 8–11 May. Back the crowdfunder on Voordekunst — sign up, donate, and help bring Lola to life.

events.title: THE BIG QUEER TOUR — RE-QUEERING AMSTERDAM’S PAST
events.desc: A queer-guided walking tour through Amsterdam, reclaiming and retelling the city’s hidden LGBTQ+ history. Meet at Koningsplein. All welcome.

events.title: BRAVE SPACE 9: UNCONDITIONAL LOVE
events.desc: The ninth edition of our celebrated queer storytelling night. This time exploring the theme of Unconditional Love — stories of family, chosen and given, from our community of brave tellers.

events.title: BRAVE SPACE 10
events.desc: The tenth edition of Backlash Media’s flagship queer storytelling night at Theater Bellevue. Bold voices, real stories, proud perspectives.

events.title: BRAVE SPACE 11
events.desc: Pride on Stage Week special edition. Brave Space takes the stage during Amsterdam’s most celebrated queer week with an unforgettable night of storytelling.

events.title: BRAVE SPACE 12 + WORKSHOP
events.desc: A double bill — Brave Space storytelling night plus a hands-on workshop. Come for the stories, stay to find your own voice.

events.title: BRAVE SPACE 13
events.desc: Brave Space returns for its thirteenth edition. Another night of fearless queer storytelling at Theater Bellevue.

events.title: BRAVE SPACE 14
events.desc: The fourteenth edition of Amsterdam’s proudest storytelling night. Brave Space closes out the year with bold voices and bent stories.

events.title: BIG GAY NAKED PUB QUIZ
events.desc: Our raucously fun queer pub quiz night at Free Willy. Test your knowledge, make new friends, and win glory. No clothes required — but they’re allowed.

events.title: BIG GAY NAKED PUB QUIZ

events.title: BIG GAY NAKED PUB QUIZ — WORLD PRIDE SPECIAL
events.desc: A World Pride special edition of our beloved queer pub quiz at Free Willy. Expect bigger crowds, bigger questions, and bigger chaos.
